chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2076 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.8212/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.8213/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on CMA No.8214/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 08.12.2025 Mr. Manoj Kumar Tejwani, Advocate for the Petitioners >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioners, under instructions, does not press the instant Constitutional Petition and submits that in the first instance, the Petitioners for redressal of their grievance will approach before the appropriate forum as provided under the law. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
